title: Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 – Ramgarhia Co-operative Bank Ltd., New Delhi – Extension of Period
description: The Reserve Bank of India issued Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 to Ramgarhia Co-operative Bank Ltd., New Delhi vide Directive No. DEL.DOS.EXG_SSM.No.S515/12-10-013/2022-2023 dated July 07, 2022 for a period of six months up to close of business on January 08, 2023, which was last extended up to close of business on April 08, 2026 vide Directive No. DOR.MON.D-48/12.28.115/2025-26 dated January 01, 2026. The Reserve Bank of India is satisfied
